children.text: by undertaking additional conservation activities; and
by improving, maintaining, and managing existing conservation activities.

children.heading: Land enrolled in other conservation programs
children.label: 1 Land enrolled in other conservation programs
i
children.text: the conservation reserve contract will expire at the end of the fiscal year in which the land is to be enrolled in the program; and

children.label: ii
children.text: conservation reserve program payments for land enrolled in the program cease before the first program payment is made to the applicant under this subpart.

children.label: B
children.text: Land enrolled in a wetland reserve easement through the agricultural conservation easement program.

children.label: A
children.text: the land had previously been enrolled in the conservation reserve program;

children.label: B
children.text: the land has been maintained using long-term crop rotation practices, as determined by the Secretary; or

children.label: C
children.text: the land is incidental land needed for efficient operation of the farm or ranch, as determined by the Secretary.
